title: Abbott India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Abbott India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Abbott India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Abbott India:
Abbott India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Abbott India!
